successCriteria.description: File src/shared/types/leave.types.ts exists and exports exactly five TypeScript enums: LeaveType, LeaveStatus, NotificationType, AuditAction, EntityType
LeaveType enum has exactly six members: ANNUAL, SICK, MATERNITY, PATERNITY, UNPAID, OTHER
LeaveStatus enum has exactly four members: PENDING, APPROVED, REJECTED, CANCELLED
NotificationType enum has exactly six members: LEAVE_REQUEST_CREATED, LEAVE_REQUEST_APPROVED, LEAVE_REQUEST_REJECTED, LEAVE_REQUEST_CANCELLED, LEAVE_BALANCE_LOW, LEAVE_BALANCE_EXPIRING
AuditAction enum has exactly three members: CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE
EntityType enum has exactly five members: LEAVE_REQUEST, LEAVE_BALANCE, LEAVE_POLICY, EMPLOYEE, NOTIFICATION
The file has zero import statements — no dependencies on any other project files
The file compiles cleanly under strict TypeScript (tsc --noEmit) with no implicit any and strict null checks

constraints: File must be created at exactly src/shared/types/leave.types.ts
All five enums must use TypeScript string enum syntax (e.g., enum Foo { BAR = 'BAR' })
No default export — all enums must be named exports
The file must have zero imports — it is a leaf module with no dependencies
outOfScope: Employee model, repository, and EmploymentStatus enum (Phase 2)
LeaveType entity interface, LeavePolicy interface, LeavePolicyQueryParams, and LeaveTypeCode enum in policy module (Phase 3)
LeaveRequest interface, CreateLeaveRequestDto, UpdateLeaveRequestDto, LeaveRequestQueryParams, and leave repository (Phase 4)
LeaveBalance interface, LeaveBalanceQueryParams, and balance repository (Phase 5)
All service classes, controllers, routes, validation schemas, and orchestration logic (Phases 6–10)
Database tables, migrations, pg Pool queries, and repository implementations (all later phases)
Unit tests for this file — Phase 1 produces only the types file with no test requirement

ambiguities.description: Naming conflict: Phase 1 intent and ARCHITECTURE.md name the enum `LeaveType`, but PLAN.md Phase 3 expects to import `LeaveTypeCode` from this same file. The ARCHITECTURE.md (reconciled) uses `LeaveType` as canonical. Resolution: use `LeaveType` as the enum name, matching ARCHITECTURE.md and DOMAIN.md.
